title: Orchestration
subtitle: Launch and orchestrate multi-agent runs — track each agent's work and status

tab.listEmpty: No runs yet — click “New run” above to start one

empty.title: Select a run to begin
empty.desc: Pick a run on the left to see its task graph and execution detail, or click “New run” to kick off a multi-agent orchestration.

composer.title: New run
composer.subtitle: Describe the goal, pick the models and roles, and let a multi-agent fleet run it for you.
composer.goalPlaceholder: What should the fleet accomplish? Spell out the goal, scope and acceptance criteria…
composer.workDirHint: Optional · leave empty to use the default workspace
composer.modelRequired: Please select at least one model
composer.noModels: No usable model configured · add and enable a model in Model management first.

model.autoHint: Will use all {{count}} enabled model(s), one member synthesized per model.

composer.rolesHint: Optional · leave empty to let the fleet assemble itself

autonomy.interactiveHint: The fleet pauses after planning and waits for your approval before executing.
autonomy.supervisedHint: Executes automatically once approved — you can still step in.

composer.replanSubtitle: Edit the goal, models, roles or autonomy and re-decompose the task graph. The old plan (tasks, assignments) is cleared and rebuilt.

run.title: Run History
run.subtitle: Browse every orchestration run you started — click any one to replay its task graph
run.emptyDesc: Give a multi-agent team a goal inside a conversation to start a run — it will show up here for review afterwards.

manage.deleteConfirm: Delete this run? Its task graph and execution records are removed too.

mobile.noTasks: The fleet is breaking the goal into tasks — they will appear here shortly.

detail.cancelConfirm: Stop this run? Tasks still executing will be cancelled.
detail.planningDesc: The fleet is breaking the goal into a task graph — nodes will appear shortly.

assign.lockedHint: When locked, the orchestrator won't auto-reassign this task on the next planning pass.

transcript.noConversation: There’s no transcript to show — it will appear here once a worker picks up this task.

steer.title: Steer
steer.hint: Inject a steering message into the worker currently running this task.
steer.placeholder: Type a steering message to inject…

precipitate.title: Save roles as assistants
precipitate.subtitle: {{count}} role(s) from this run can be saved as assistants for reuse
precipitate.exists: An assistant with this name already exists
